List common nutrients and their food sources
Describe the My Plate food guidance system
Describe the vegan basic four food groups
Discuss nutritional and fluid needs of the elderly
Describe therapeutic diets commonly ordered for patients/residents and the responsibilities of the Nurse Assistant

Discuss cultural and religious influences on dietary practices
Identify alternative ways to administer nutrition
